response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified the primary vocal performance as a cover of 'Baka Mitai' (ばかみたい). 2. Performed a search for the lyrics of 'Baka Mitai' in both Japanese and English. 3. Confirmed the original context of the song is from the Yakuza (Like a Dragon) series. 4. Segmented the video based on content (Introduction, Karaoke Performance, Transition, Skit, Commercial/Merch, Outro). 5. Mapped metadata to scenes and ensured full lyrics were included.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTubers Cecilia Immergreen and Gigi Murin performing a cover of the song 'Baka Mitai', followed by a skit, and a merchandise announcement segment for the 'Autofister Network'.

scenes.description: An introductory segment where the performers greet the audience. No music is playing.
The VTubers perform a karaoke version of 'Baka Mitai'. Japanese text 'ばかみたい' appears on screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Bakamitai, you're such a child.
You got hurt chasing your dreams.
You're bad at lying, yet you showed me that smile that couldn't even laugh.
You don't even say 'I love you' properly,
You're awkward and really clumsy.
Even so, even so, why were you able to say goodbye?
No good, no good, no good at all.
I love you, I love you too much.
No matter how strong the alcohol I drink,
These unyielding memories are just foolish.
Bakamitai, you're such a fool.
All I did was believe in you,
Pretending to be a strong woman, bathing in the sorrowful night wind.
Three years have passed since I became alone,
Even the cityscape has changed.
Even so, even so, why are only my regrets left behind?
You're really not a good man.
I'll take off the matching ring.
Serves you right, I feel relieved.
Even if I wait forever, it's just Bakamitai.
No good, no good, no good at all.
I love you, I love you too much.
No matter how strong the alcohol I drink,
These unyielding memories are just foolish.
You're really not a good man.
I'll take off the matching ring.
Serves you right, I feel relieved.
What are these tears? Bakamitai.

scenes.description: A brief glitch effect transition. No music or dialogue.
The VTubers participate in a skit about future content. No vocal music.
A commercial segment featuring merchandise for the 'Autofister Network'. No vocal music.
Outro segment of the show. No vocal music.
